checks.note: A record now resolves to 216.24.57.1 (changed from previous Squarespace IPs). Google Cloud DNS nameservers.
Site responding with HTTP 200. Fast TTFB at 208ms.
Landing page domain responding. Higher latency than HQ domain (1.1s TTFB).
Render app healthy and responding with HTTP 200.

previous_blockers_resolved.title: Root domain DNS pointed to Squarespace

previous_blockers_resolved.title: /api/status unreachable via domain

observations.title: secondmindlabs.com latency elevated
observations.detail: TTFB of 1.1s on secondmindlabs.com vs 208ms on secondmindhq.com. May indicate different hosting or cold start.

observations.title: Domain routing per commit ab8548b
observations.detail: secondmindlabs.com = landing page, secondmindhq.com = dashboard. Both resolving and serving HTTP 200.

summary.verdict: ALL ENDPOINTS ONLINE — DNS resolved, HTTPS healthy, Render deployment responding. Previous Squarespace DNS blocker appears resolved.
